parameters.query:
UPDATE users
SET 
    id_deal_crm = '{{ $node["cria_deal1"].runIndex >= 0      ? $node["cria_deal1"].json["opportunity"]["id"] :  $node["update_deal1"].runIndex >= 0      ? $node["update_deal1"].json["opportunity"]["id"] : $node["update_deal3"].runIndex >= 0      ?  $node["update_deal3"].json["opportunity"]["id"] : null }}',
      data_atualizacao = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP -- Define a data/hora atual no formato TIMESTAMP
WHERE 
    id = {{ $node["fluxo_chamado"].json["body"]["id_user"] }};

parameters.query:
UPDATE users
SET 
    id_deal_crm = '{{ $node["cria_deal1"].runIndex >= 0      ? $node["cria_deal1"].json["opportunity"]["id"] :  $node["update_deal1"].runIndex >= 0      ? $node["update_deal1"].json["opportunity"]["id"] : $node["update_deal3"].runIndex >= 0      ?  $node["update_deal3"].json["opportunity"]["id"] : null }}',
      data_atualizacao = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP -- Define a data/hora atual no formato TIMESTAMP
WHERE 
    id = {{ $node["fluxo_chamado"].json["body"]["id_user"] }};
